activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.certificate_value:
Bohus BioTech AB
Trädgårdsgatan 4
SE-452 31, STRÖMSTAD
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
Bohus Biotech AB
Trädgårdsgatan 4
45231 Strömstad
SWEDEN
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Bohus BioTech AB' from Sweden in the certificate matches issuer 'Bohus Biotech AB' in the invoice including address and country after normalization of company name (allowed juridical forms normalization) and country name according to rule 4.1.6 and 4.1.4. The consignor name is found explicitly as invoice issuer and in address blocks. No contradictions found.

consignee.certificate_value:
NT Solutions Co LTD
35 A4 Street
Ward 12
Tan Binh District
70000 Ho Chi Minh City
Viet Nam
consignee.invoice_value:
NT Solutions Co LTD
35 A4 Street, Ward 12, Tan Binh District
Ho Chi Minh City 70000
VIETNAM
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'NT Solutions Co LTD' as stated in the certificate matches the invoice buyer and consignee fields explicitly, including name and address (Vietnam) after normalization. Consignee can be identified in the invoice's buyer fields with same address and country. No contradictions found.

goods_description.certificate_value:
Medical devices Total Net weight 3 boxes: 24,75kg
Minivisc Plus; MPFY24100B, 750pcs
goods_description.motivation: Article number 'MPFY24100B' from certificate matches '1184' (Minivisc Plus 14mg/ml) in invoice with net weight 24.75 kg and quantity 750 pcs. The certificate contains a general goods description with explicit invoice reference and date, which is confirmed by invoice number and date. Hence, goods description considered verified according to rules.

quantity.motivation: Quantity of 750 pcs and net weight 24.75 kg in the certificate matches exactly with invoice quantities and weights with acceptable minor decimal normalization and unit equivalence. Both documents state net weight and pieces with consistent units and values. No contradictions found.

origin.motivation: Origin country 'Sweden' in the certificate is explicitly stated as 'Country of Origin:Sweden' in the invoice. EU origin normalization rule applied considering 'European Union' in certificate and specific country in invoice. No conflicting countries found.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All control points matched after applying allowed normalization rules and verifying that consignor, consignee, goods description, quantities, and origin country from the certificate appear correctly and consistently in the invoice. The certificate references the invoice explicitly and invoice data correspond accordingly.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer mellan certifikat och faktura. Consignor är Bohus BioTech AB, mottagaren NT Solutions Co LTD, och varubeskrivningen inkluderar Minivisc Plus med korrekt kvantitet och vikt. Ursprungslandet Sverige bekräftas i fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
